---
title: "Conditional Probabilities"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(spicyR)
  library(SpatialDatasets)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidySingleCellExperiment)
})
```

```{r}
spe = SpatialDatasets::spe_Amancherla_2025()
```


```{r}
# cellular/antibody rejection scores (patient level)
spe$patient_cellular_grading |> unique()
spe$patient_antibody_grading |> unique()
```

```{r}
colData(spe) |> as.data.frame() |> distinct(patient_id, patient_rejection_type)
```

```{r}
colData(spe) |> as.data.frame() |> distinct(patient_id, sample_id, patient_rejection_type, biopsy_rejection_type) |>
  arrange(patient_id)
```

```{r}
spe$biopsy_timing |> unique()
```

```{r}
spe$cav_grade |> unique()
```

```{r}
assayNames(spe)
```

```{r}
hist(assay(spe[1, ], "counts"))
```

```{r}
hist(assay(spe[1, ], "logcounts"))
```

```{r}
hist(assay(spe[1, ], "scaledata"))
```

```{r}
colSums(assay(spe, "counts")) |> hist()
```

```{r}
spe$ct_second_pass |> unique()
```

```{r}
# whether rejection responded to immunotherapy
spe$resolution_broad |> unique()
```

```{r}
spe$lineage |> unique()
```

## No weights spicyR

```{r}
# subsample to post-transplant, cellular/antibody rejection
speSub = spe |> filter(biopsy_timing %in% "post" &
                         patient_rejection_type %in% c("mixed_rejection", "cellular_rejection"))

# sample 10 patients from each patient
set.seed(51773)

sampledPatients = colData(speSub) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  distinct(patient_id, patient_rejection_type) |>
  group_by(patient_rejection_type) |>
  slice_sample(n = 10) |>
  pull(patient_id)

speSub = speSub[, speSub$patient_id %in% sampledPatients]
```

```{r}
colData(speSub) |> as.data.frame() |> distinct(patient_id, patient_rejection_type) |> dplyr::count(patient_rejection_type)
```

```{r}
colData(speSub) |> as.data.frame() |> count(Sample) |> arrange(n)
```
```{r}
speSub$patient_id = droplevels(speSub$patient_id)
speSub$Sample = droplevels(speSub$Sample)
```


```{r}
spicyNoWeights = spicy(speSub,
                       condition = "resolution_broad",
                       subject = "patient_id",
                       imageID = "Sample",
                       cellType = "ct_second_pass",
                       spatialCoords = c("adj_x_centroid", "adj_y_centroid"),
                       window = "convex",
                       cores = 12)
```

```{r}
topPairs(spicyNoWeights)
```

## Generate weights with scClassify

```{r}
# extract log-normalised expression matrix and existing cell type labels
exprMat = assay(speSub, "logcounts")
labels  = droplevels(speSub$ct_second_pass)

# stratified 5-fold CV — folds are balanced across cell types
set.seed(51773)
folds = createFolds(labels, k = 5, list = TRUE, returnTrain = FALSE)

# initialise vector to store per-cell confidence scores
cellProbs = rep(NA_real_, ncol(speSub))

for (i in seq_along(folds)) {
  # split into test (1 fold) and train (remaining 4 folds)
  testIdx  = folds[[i]]
  trainIdx = setdiff(seq_len(ncol(speSub)), testIdx)

  # train scClassify on the 4 training folds
  trainModel = train_scClassify(
    exprsMat_train  = exprMat[, trainIdx],
    cellTypes_train = labels[trainIdx],
    algorithm       = "WKNN",
    returnList      = FALSE)

  # predict on the held-out test fold
  predRes = predict_scClassify(
    exprsMat_test  = exprMat[, testIdx],
    trainRes       = trainModel,
    cellTypes_test = labels[testIdx])

  # extract max probability across cell types as the confidence score for each cell
  probMat = predRes$testRes[[1]]$probMat
  cellProbs[testIdx] = apply(probMat, 1, max)
}

# store confidence scores in the SPE object for downstream use in spicyR
speSub$scClassify_confidence = cellProbs
```
